name: tan-studio
description: Manage coffee roasts, brews, tasting notes, Wi-Fi bridges, and the Kaffeelogic device through Tan Studio's typed local API.

interface.shortDescription: Manage coffee roasts and brews from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the Tan Studio service at xrc.local to inspect profiles, coffees, roasts, pantry, registered Wi-Fi bridges, and device status; record brews and tasting notes; and create roast labels through a generated OpenAPI client.
defaultPrompt: What coffee is ready to brew today?
Record a brew and my tasting notes.
Compare my recent roasts of this coffee.
